sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: The geothermal_vent changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
The geothermal_vent changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Another year. Geothermal vent discovered nearby. The colony feels hopeful. My paranoia grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 33): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
